description: Divorce agreement, Qaraite. Dated: Wednesday, 25 Nisan 5488 AM, which is 1728 CE. This does not seem to be a ketubba, per Ktiv, but rather a divorce agreement between David b. Raḥamin b. Yosef known as Ḥakīm and his wife Najma. This document is not the bill of divorce itself, but served to confirm conditions of the couple's separation. Currency: silver medin (niṣf fiḍḍa). Signed and scribed: Yeshuʿa Sofer. Many other witnesses are named, but none signed.
description_he: הסכם גירושין קראי. תאריך: ד', כ"ה ניסן 5488 = 1728 לספירה. הסכם גירושין בין דוד ב' רחמים ב' יוסף הידוע כחכים לאשתו נג'מה. מאשר תנאי הפרידה. נחתם על ידי ישועה סופר.
